excerpt: Angela, a gleefully homicidal camp counselor, punishes misbehaving campers in increasingly over-the-top fashions.
title: Sleepaway Camp II: Unhappy Campers

excerpt: A slasher film told entirely from the killer’s perspective, as an undead man stalks the Canadian wilderness to reclaim a stolen locket.
title: In a Violent Nature

excerpt: A special prosecutor tries to break gangster Humphrey Bogart’s hold on the trucking business, with driver George Brent caught in the middle.
title: Racket Busters

excerpt: After arriving in town to find his new boss murdered, hard-boiled ranch hand John Wayne starts asking questions and gets bullets for answers.
title: Tall in the Saddle

excerpt: Facing failing grades and her ex-boyfriend moving on, a high-school senior goes from call girl to blackmailer to assassin.
title: Malibu High
